cards.title: Daily Blog Post
cards.description: Write about yesterdays RE news + current mortgage rates

cards.description: Check new listings, expired listings, closed listings. Share standouts with buyers.

cards.description: Post RE news threads across X, Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram

cards.title: Prospecting Block
cards.description: Door flyers, cold calls (RedX), or expired listing calls

cards.title: Set Up Morning Brief
cards.description: Morning brief set up for 6:30am EST, Mon-Fri via Telegram. Includes RE news, mortgage rates, blog draft, schedule.

cards.title: Gmail Integration
cards.description: Email account created. SMTP sending works. Account under Google review until ~2/5. CC Chris on all emails.

cards.title: Lead Follow-Up System
cards.description: Build a system for consistent lead follow-up via email

cards.title: Audrey Cross-Referral Strategy
cards.description: Develop referral pipeline between Audreys photography clients and RE business

cards.title: NH House Hunt
cards.description: Monitor 5-bedroom listings in Southern NH (~35 min from Townsend, MA). Need in-law suite.

cards.title: Email Sent: Hello Test
cards.description: First test email from William to Chris. Confirmed working!

cards.title: Kanban Board - Live & Permanent
cards.description: Built kanban board, deployed to Render with permanent URL. Logo + Jost font branded.

cards.title: Study RPR Platform
cards.description: Watch RPR training videos (youtube.com/@narrpr). Learn CMAs, comps, market trends, refined values, reports. Master the tool.

cards.title: Showing Prep: Suzanne & Kevin (2/5)
cards.description: Prep sheets done for 3 properties. 134 Deskin Dr (South Daytona), 806 Silk Oak Ct & 1108 Loch Laggan Ct (New Smyrna Beach). Chris handling 785 Falcon Dr.

cards.title: RPR Property Research Automation
cards.description: Built headless Playwright script to login to RPR and pull property data automatically. Can search any address and get RVM, comps, sales history.

cards.title: Daily Blog Draft for Chris
cards.description: Prepare daily blog draft matching thehooverhometeam.com/blog format. RE news + mortgage rates. Included in morning brief.

cards.title: Get BlueHost Access
cards.description: Chris to provide BlueHost login so William can publish blog posts directly to thehooverhometeam.com

cards.title: Text Prospecting System (Twilio)
cards.description: Research and build compliant text prospecting system. A2P 10DLC registration, personalized scripts, opt-out handling. 2,000 numbers/month capacity.

cards.title: Gmail Re-verification
cards.description: williamstrongthht@gmail.com was flagged during setup. Appeal approved. Chris re-verifying. Should be back by 2/5.

cards.title: Study Ricky Carruth Content
cards.description: Watch Ricky Carruth YouTube (youtube.com/@RickyCarruth). Learn prospecting systems, phone scripts, Zero to Diamond methodology.

cards.title: Permanent Kanban URL
cards.description: Board deployed to Render with permanent URL. Chris has it bookmarked. GitHub repo: williamstronghtth/thht-board

cards.title: Morning Brief - 6:30am EST
cards.description: Automated daily brief via Telegram at 6:30am EST (M-F). Includes: RE news, mortgage rates, blog draft, schedule. LIVE and running.

cards.title: RPR Property Research for Showings
cards.description: Use RPR to pull property data, RVM estimates, sales history, and comps before any client showings. Prep negotiation angles.

cards.title: Learn RPR Training Videos
cards.description: Study youtube.com/@narrpr to master CMAs, comps, market trends, refined values, and all RPR features.
